text: A reply brief cited a case that did not exist. The Second Circuit identified the citation as apparently generated by ChatGPT and referred counsel to the court's grievance panel.
deployer: Counsel for appellant in Second Circuit appeal
canonical_source_conflicted: Second Circuit case law and cited legal authority
mitigation_gap: No cite-checking caught the nonexistent case before filing; counsel did not ensure AI-assisted legal research matched real authority.
reliance_or_harm: Counsel was referred for possible discipline and the court issued a published warning on AI verification duties.
